The '''IC-M General Utility Droid''' ('''[[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] maintenance droid'''), originally known as the '''RC-M-series''' ('''Republic City maintenance droid'''), was used as a janitor in Imperial City.

==Characteristics==
Constructed with two heads which faced each other, one was equipped with optical sensors, while the other had a data display screen. These heads allowed the droid to view the plans and blueprints it was working with while it operated. Just under two meters tall, this cylindrical droid was also equipped with a variety of manipulation arms and extendible tools, and its torso could telescope upward to allow the droid to reach high places.<ref name="EGD" />

==History==
Thousands were initially sold to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] over a century before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], then renamed after the creation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. They were very durable.<ref name="EGD" /> [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] once encountered a droid in the underlevels of Coruscant, trying to fulfill its decades old order to replace a string of burnt out lights.
